(C) This table follows a modified method. Here we do not
add one to the remainder to get the birth nakshatra. The
Nakshatras are connted from Asvini to Revati. The number
are the Vighatis. Friday starts the week.

Monday at Gh,22.51. After dividing by 63, we have the
remainder 48. Nakshatra is Krittika, the eighth from
Dhanishtha. Table IV (B) shows that the time is correct.

64 Rectification of Birth Time
Sunday, Anuradha, at 29.45.
